articles.title: Thoothukudi Corporation sets up ‘green cover’ at traffic signals amid scorching heat - thehindu.com
articles.search_term: (heatwave OR "heat wave" OR "severe heatwave" OR "extreme heat" OR "heat spell" OR "scorching heat" OR "blistering heat" OR "sweltering heat" OR "hot winds" OR loo OR "hot loo winds" OR "intense heat" OR "unbearable heat" OR "deadly heat" OR heat OR "weather forecast" OR "weather update" OR "weather alert" OR "IMD forecast" OR "IMD prediction" OR "IMD alert" OR IMD OR "rising temperatures" OR "temperatures expected to rise" OR "relief from heat" OR "respite from heat" OR "heat respite" OR "respite from scorching heat") Tamil Nadu
articles.full_text:
In an effort to provide relief for the motorists during the ongoing scorching summer, Thoothukudi Corporation has installed green shade shelters at key traffic signals within the city limits.
As summers grow increasingly hotter and more humid each year, commuting during the daytime has become a horrendous experience for motorists, especially two-wheeler riders.
Published - May 01, 2026 07:53 pm IST
